Package org.eventb.core.preferences

Interface IXMLPrefSerializer<T>

Type Parameters:
T - the type of preference to serialize / deserialize
All Known Implementing Classes:
PrefUnitTranslator
public interface IXMLPrefSerializer<T>
Common protocol for xml preference translators.
Since:
2.3

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    IPrefMapEntry<T>
    get(Node n, IInjectLog log)
    Deserializes the given node.
    void
    put(IPrefMapEntry<T> pref, Document doc, Node parent)
    Serializes the given preference into the given parent.
    void
    resolveReferences(IPrefMapEntry<T> pref, CachedPreferenceMap<T> map, IInjectLog log)
    Replaces the reference placeholders, contained in the given preference, by actual references obtained from the given map.

  • Method Details

    • put

      void put(IPrefMapEntry<T> pref, Document doc, Node parent)
      Serializes the given preference into the given parent.
      Parameters:
      pref - a preference
      doc - the document where serialization takes place
      parent - the parent of the serialized preference

    • get

      IPrefMapEntry<T> get(Node n, IInjectLog log) throws PreferenceUtils.PreferenceException
      Deserializes the given node.
      Parameters:
      n - a node
      log - a log to record warnings about partially loaded nodes
      Returns:
      the deserialized preference
      Throws:
      PreferenceUtils.PreferenceException - if deserialization failed
      Since:
      3.0

    • resolveReferences

      void resolveReferences(IPrefMapEntry<T> pref, CachedPreferenceMap<T> map, IInjectLog log)
      Replaces the reference placeholders, contained in the given preference, by actual references obtained from the given map.
      Parameters:
      pref - a preference
      map - a preference map
      log - a log to record warnings about unresolved references
      Since:
      3.0
